ksa_text: Knowledge of AI conformity assessment and compliance lifecycle management, including conformity assessment procedures, CE marking requirements, notified body engagement, post-market surveillance obligations, and AI value chain liability triggers.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) supply chain security and risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
